name: myclario-pytest-automation
description: Automation testing framework for MyClario using Python, Pytest BDD, and Playwright

scripts.test:qa:headed:report: set MYCLARIO_ENV=qa&& set MYCLARIO_HEADLESS=false&& if exist reports\allure-results rmdir /s /q reports\allure-results && if exist reports\allure-report rmdir /s /q reports\allure-report && ..\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest && allure generate reports\allure-results --clean -o reports\allure-report
scripts.test:login: set MYCLARIO_ENV=qa&& set MYCLARIO_HEADLESS=true&& ..\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest src/test/tests/test_mc_Login.py
scripts.test:login:headed: set MYCLARIO_ENV=qa&& set MYCLARIO_HEADLESS=false&& ..\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest src/test/tests/test_mc_Login.py
scripts.test:contacts: set MYCLARIO_ENV=qa&& set MYCLARIO_HEADLESS=true&& ..\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest src/test/tests/test_mc_Contacts.py
scripts.test:contacts:headed: set MYCLARIO_ENV=qa&& set MYCLARIO_HEADLESS=false&& ..\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest src/test/tests/test_mc_Contacts.py
scripts.bdd:login: set MYCLARIO_ENV=qa&& set MYCLARIO_HEADLESS=true&& ..\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest src/test/tests/test_mc_Login.py
scripts.bdd:login:headed: set MYCLARIO_ENV=qa&& set MYCLARIO_HEADLESS=false&& ..\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest src/test/tests/test_mc_Login.py
scripts.bdd:contacts: set MYCLARIO_ENV=qa&& set MYCLARIO_HEADLESS=true&& ..\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest src/test/tests/test_mc_Contacts.py
scripts.bdd:contacts:headed: set MYCLARIO_ENV=qa&& set MYCLARIO_HEADLESS=false&& ..\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest src/test/tests/test_mc_Contacts.py
scripts.allure:clean: if exist reports\allure-results rmdir /s /q reports\allure-results && if exist reports\allure-report rmdir /s /q reports\allure-report
